title: Poke Dragon
description: The PokeDragon Modpack is custom-made for the PokeDragon server, bringing a unique Pixelmon experience in version 1.16.5 with the new generation of Pokémon! It was designed to offer the perfect balance between challenge and fun!
body:
PokeDragon – Pixelmon 1.16.5 Modpack

Step into the world of PokeDragon, a Pixelmon modpack specially crafted for adventurers and trainers who want to explore a universe filled with Pokémon and challenges! 🌟🔥

⚔️ Battle against trainers and gyms
🌎 Explore a vast world with incredible biomes
🏠 Build your base and customize your journey
🔮 Catch legendary Pokémon and create your dream team
⚡ Extra mods to enhance your gameplay experience

If you're looking for a server where strategy, exploration, and epic battles come together, PokeDragon is the place for you!

✨ Download now and become a Pokémon Master! ✨
